description_long: This hamburger features a round, slightly domed bun with a rich, golden-brown color and a glossy finish, marked by a distinctive swirl pattern on the top. The bun appears thick and dense, with no visible sesame seeds or toppings on its surface. The patty and any internal ingredients are not visible from any angle, suggesting the bun is either oversized or the filling is recessed. The edges of the bun are smooth and well-defined, and the overall appearance is compact and uniform. There are no visible condiments, vegetables, or cheese protruding from the sides. The hamburger sits directly on a flat green surface, with no packaging or additional items present.
description: A round, glossy, golden-brown hamburger with a swirl-patterned top bun and no visible fillings or toppings. The bun is thick and smooth, with no sesame seeds or packaging present.
description_view_0: From this view, the hamburger appears as a round, golden-brown bun with a prominent swirl pattern on top and no visible fillings.
description_view_1: This angle shows the hamburger's side, confirming the bun's thickness and smooth edge, with no internal ingredients visible.
description_view_2: The top-down view highlights the swirl pattern and uniform color of the bun, with no toppings or patty visible.
description_view_3: From this side, the bun's rounded edge and glossy finish are clear, and the absence of any fillings or toppings is confirmed.
attribute_topping_arrangement: No toppings are visible; the bun fully encloses the interior with no protruding ingredients or visible layers.
